inputs.name: conv_x
inputs.desc: Packed convolution history + new tokens [num_seqs, num_channels, kernel_size - 1 + num_tokens]

weights.name: kernel
weights.desc: Per-channel causal depthwise SSM convolution weights

outputs.name: out
outputs.desc: Convolved per-token recurrent inputs [num_seqs, num_tokens, num_channels]

strategies.name: channel
strategies.notes: Each channel is independent for the causal depthwise convolution.

constraints.notes: Matches ggml's GGML_OP_SSM_CONV used by qwen3next/Qwen3.5 before the recurrent DeltaNet update.

impl.c_declaration: void ssm_conv1d_forward(const float *conv_x, const float *kernel, float *out, int kernel_size, int num_channels, int num_tokens, int num_seqs);

parity.notes: Forward parity against the llama.cpp helper implementation matching GGML_OP_SSM_CONV.

notes: SSM causal depthwise convolution used by qwen3next/Qwen3.5 recurrent blocks.
